title: T1.2: Fix empty API key file auth bypass — _load_api_key() returns None for empty/whitespace files. Update tests. Files: server/tmux_status_server/server.py, server/tests/test_server.py, server/tests/test_validate_gaps.py [fix-cycle-2, auth]

text: Acceptance: (1) _load_api_key() returns None for empty/whitespace-only key files. (2) logger.warning is called when empty key detected. (3) Update test_empty_api_key_file_returns_empty_string and test_whitespace_only_api_key_file_returns_empty_string — change assertions from == "" to is None. (4) Update TestEmptyApiKeySecurityFinding tests in test_validate_gaps.py to reflect new behavior.
